meaning: n.抹布,碎屑,石板瓦,破旧衣服,少量vt.揶揄,戏弄,欺负vi.喧闹
examples: He plugged the hole in the pipe with an old rag.
The ragged man drags a wagon of rag fragments.
He was wiping his hands on an oily rag.
Yet Ms. Krall's latest album, "Glad Rag Doll, " shows that such definitions are now themselves out-dated.
The girl looked like a rag doll, with her striped stockings and limp bangs.
